name: Salesloft
description: Sync Salesloft people, cadences, calls, emails, and accounts into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Your Salesloft OAuth app Client ID
install_fields.help: Create an OAuth app at https://developers.salesloft.com and copy the Client ID.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Your Salesloft OAuth app Client Secret
install_fields.help: The Client Secret generated when you registered your OAuth application.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Optional. The redirect URI registered with your Salesloft OAuth application.

methods.name: Install / Validate
methods.description: Validate that client_id and client_secret are present.

methods.name: Authorize
methods.description: Return the Salesloft OAuth2 authorization URL.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /v2/me.json and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Salesloft people, cadences, and calls into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Calls
methods.description: Paginated list of Salesloft call activities.

methods.name: List Emails
methods.description: Paginated list of Salesloft email activities.

apis.name: Install / Validate
apis.description: Validate that client_id and client_secret are present.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: Build and return the Salesloft OAuth2 authorization URL.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Ping GET /v2/me.json and return current health.

apis.name: Sync Records
apis.description: Sync Salesloft people, cadences, and calls into the knowledge base.
